Our Sustainability Commitment

Building a Regenerative Future for Our Planet

Sustainability isn't a department at EcoCycle — it's our entire business model. Every decision we make is evaluated through the lens of environmental impact, social responsibility, and long-term planetary health.

0%
Carbon Reduced Since 2018
0%
Landfill Diversion Rate
0M
Trees Equivalent Saved
0%
Renewable Energy Target
ESG Framework

Our ESG Goals & Progress

We measure what matters. Our ESG commitments are tracked, reported, and third-party verified annually.

Environmental
4 Key Goals

Carbon Neutral by 2028

55%

100% electric fleet, renewable energy in all facilities, Scope 1 & 2 emissions fully offset.

ProgressNet Zero

95% Landfill Diversion

72%

Expand material recovery to maximize waste diversion from all collection routes.

Progress2030 Goal

Renewable Energy Transition

68%

100% renewable electricity across all processing facilities and office locations.

Progress100% Renewables

Water Stewardship

44%

Reduce water usage in operations by 40% through closed-loop recycling systems.

Progress40% Reduction
Social
4 Key Goals

Living Wage for All Employees

✓

All 2,500 employees earn at least 120% of local living wage with full benefits.

ProgressAchieved

Workforce Diversity

42%

50% women and underrepresented groups in senior leadership roles by 2026.

Progress50% Diversity

Community Investment

65%

$10M invested in environmental education and community sustainability programs.

Progress$10M Goal

Zero Workplace Incidents

88%

Industry-leading safety record with TRIR below 1.0 across all operations.

ProgressTRIR < 1.0
Governance
4 Key Goals

Board Independence

✓

Majority independent board with dedicated ESG committee and quarterly reporting.

ProgressAchieved

Supply Chain Transparency

78%

100% of major suppliers ESG-rated and audited for environmental compliance.

Progress100% Verified

Data Privacy & Security

✓

Zero data breaches and full GDPR/CCPA compliance across all systems.

ProgressFull Compliance

Climate Risk Disclosure

90%

Full TCFD-aligned climate risk reporting with scenario analysis and financial impact.

ProgressTCFD Aligned
Circular Economy Model

Closing the Loop on Waste

Our circular economy model transforms the traditional linear take-make-dispose system into a continuous loop where waste becomes a resource.

CIRCULAR
ECONOMY
🚛Collect
🔄Sort
♻️Recycle
🌿Reuse
🏭Manufacture
🚛
Step 1

Collect

Smart route optimized collection from residential, commercial, and industrial sources

🔄
Step 2

Sort

AI-powered sorting systems separate materials at our MRF facilities

♻️
Step 3

Recycle

Advanced processing converts sorted materials into recycled feedstock

🌿
Step 4

Reuse

Recovered materials are prepared for direct reuse and redistribution

🏭
Step 5

Manufacture

Recycled content returned to manufacturers as raw material inputs

Reports & Disclosures

Transparent Reporting

We publish comprehensive sustainability reports with full third-party verification. Transparency is the foundation of trust.

Annual Report

Annual Sustainability Report 2024

Comprehensive overview of our environmental performance, ESG metrics, and progress toward 2030 goals.

2024
86 pages4.2 MB
Carbon Report

Carbon Footprint Assessment 2024

Third-party verified Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions inventory with reduction pathway analysis.

2024
48 pages2.8 MB
Social Report

Social Impact Report 2024

Community investment, workforce diversity, safety performance, and social equity initiatives.

2024
62 pages3.5 MB
Data Report

Recycling Performance Data 2024

Detailed material recovery rates, contamination levels, and commodity market performance by region.

2024
34 pages1.9 MB
Annual Report

Annual Sustainability Report 2023

Full 2023 sustainability performance with year-over-year comparisons and stakeholder feedback.

2023
78 pages3.8 MB
Verification

GHG Verification Statement 2023

Independent third-party verification of greenhouse gas emissions data per ISO 14064 standard.

2023
12 pages0.8 MB
GRI Standards
TCFD Aligned
CDP Verified
